title: roegneria macerrima
intro: Roegneria macerrima, also known as Korean wild rice or wild rice grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is traditionally used in Eastern medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Roegneria macerrima include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and reduce blood sugar levels. Roegneria macerrima can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as dried and used in supplements or as a natural remedy for various health issues.
